title: event — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by EventServiceProvider::boot() for use in FormRequests + Data classes. Named after their intent so they read cleanly at composition site.

rules.name: valid_event_type
rules.description: Ensures event_type is one of the enum values.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: tournament, match, showcase, workshop, camp, conference, social, graduation, awards_ceremony, open_house, other.

rules.name: valid_event_format
rules.description: Ensures format (when set) is one of the enum values.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: single_elimination, double_elimination, round_robin, group_stage, seeded_bracket, friendly, clinic, lecture, social_only.

rules.name: valid_event_date_range
rules.description: Ensures ends_at >= starts_at with optional minimum duration in minutes and maximum span in days. Field-level (class-level) rule.

params.name: min_minutes
params.description: Minimum event duration in minutes (0 = single-instant events allowed).

params.name: max_days
params.description: Maximum event span in days (default 60 = long camp/festival upper bound).

rules.default_message: The event's date range must be between :min_minutes minutes and :max_days days.

rules.name: valid_event_registration_window
rules.description: Composite rule ensuring registration_opens_at < registration_closes_at <= starts_at when set. Field-level (class-level).
rules.default_message: The registration window is invalid: opens must precede closes, and closes must land at or before starts_at.

rules.name: valid_event_age_range
rules.description: Ensures min_age (when set) <= max_age (when set) and both fall in [3, 100]. Field-level.
rules.default_message: The age range is invalid: min_age must be <= max_age and both must be between 3 and 100.

rules.name: valid_gender_category
rules.description: Ensures gender_category is one of male / female / mixed / any (or null).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: male, female, mixed, any.

rules.name: valid_visibility_value
rules.description: Ensures visibility is one of public / tenant_only / participants_only / private.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: public, tenant_only, participants_only, private.

rules.name: valid_entry_fee
rules.description: Ensures entry_fee_cents >= 0 and when > 0, entry_fee_currency IS NOT NULL. When allow_late_registration=true, late_registration_fee_cents > 0. Field-level.
rules.default_message: Entry fee configuration is invalid: paid events require a currency; late-registration requires a positive fee.

rules.name: valid_prize_pool
rules.description: Ensures prize_pool_cents (when set) >= 0 and prize_pool_currency IS NOT NULL. Field-level.
rules.default_message: The prize pool configuration is invalid: a prize pool requires a currency.

rules.name: valid_sponsors_json
rules.description: Validates sponsors JSONB array shape: each entry has name (required, string <=128), optional logo_url (URL), tier (enum gold/silver/bronze/partner).

rules.name: valid_livestream_url
rules.description: Ensures livestream_url is a valid HTTPS URL <=512 chars (HTTPS-only to prevent leaks).
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be a valid HTTPS URL.

rules.name: valid_event_facility_purpose
rules.description: Ensures purpose is one of competition / warm_up / registration / spectator / vip.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: competition, warm_up, registration, spectator, vip.

rules.name: one_primary_facility_per_event
rules.description: Ensures setting is_primary=true on this row will not create a second primary in the same event (the observer auto-demotes; this rule surfaces the form-level warning).
rules.default_message: Another facility in this event is already marked primary. Setting this row primary will demote the other automatically.

rules.name: event_facility_within_branch
rules.description: Ensures the facility.branch.organization_id matches event.organization_id (a facility must belong to the event's organization). When event.branch_id IS NOT NULL, facility.branch_id must equal event.branch_id.
rules.default_message: The facility must belong to the event's organization (and, when the event pins a branch, to the same branch).
